title: SV: type parameter support - module/class
body:
Hi,
  Can we get type parameter support please? can start with module and then class maybe?

Below is a tiny test and log.

Thanks
Srini

```verilog

module ivl_uvm_mbx #(parameter type T = int) ();

  int q_size;
  T my_q[$];
 
endmodule : ivl_uvm_mbx 

```

```log
../ivl_uvm_i417.sv:4: syntax error
I give up.
```
